backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining courses, lessons, enrollment, progress tracking, and admin‑gated initialization using access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features to source files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of all major frontend files, pages, components, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH theme variables and global light/dark mode design tokens.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML file loading the React app with a mount point and module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main router setup defining routes for landing, courses, lessons, and authenticated dashboard.
Authentication button handling Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query reset.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAuth: Route guard rendering sign‑in prompts for unauthenticated users and protected content otherwise.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Layout wrapper providing header, footer, and main outlet for routed pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Footer displaying attribution and a short learning tagline.
frontend/src/components/layout/HeaderNav: Sticky header with logo, navigation links, and auth button, showing My Learning when signed in.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor using the user's Internet Identity, reinitializing and invalidating queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCourses.ts: Provides queries for fetching a single course, browsing all courses, and searching courses using the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useEnrollment.ts: Defines a mutation to enroll the user in a course and invalidates course and user progress queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity provider and hook for managing authentication state, loading identities, and handling login/logout.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyLearning.ts: Combines user progress and course data to compute enrolled courses with progress and next lessons.
frontend/src/hooks/useProgress.ts: Exposes queries for user and course progress plus a mutation for completing lessons, with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles, themes, and custom design tokens for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/CourseDetailPage.tsx: Renders a course detail view with enrollment, progress display, lesson navigation, and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/CourseListPage.tsx: Displays a searchable list of courses with loading skeletons and links to individual course pages.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Provides the home page with hero content, feature highlights, and sign-in or course navigation options.
frontend/src/pages/LessonViewerPage.tsx: Shows an individual lesson with navigation between lessons and allows authenticated users to mark lessons complete.
frontend/src/pages/MyLearningPage.tsx: Displays enrolled courses with progress tracking and links to continue learning.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and managing URL and session-based parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, content paths, extended colors, typography, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata including features, requests, image requirements, and overall app state for the Shikho Computer Class project.
